text:
EXPLANATION: The paper is confirmed real and widely indexed. The cited author name "Will Hamilton" is simply an informal shorthand for "William L. Hamilton," the same person; the second author "Zhitao Ying" matches "Rex Ying" (a known nickname), and "Jure Leskovec" matches exactly. The NIPS 2017 venue and year are correct.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/1706.02216
FOUND_TITLE: Inductive Representation Learning on Large Graphs
FOUND_AUTHORS: William L. Hamilton, Zhitao Ying, Jure Leskovec
FOUND_YEAR: 2017
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
